items.title: With Jordan Clarkson officially re-signed, all 8 of the Knicks' top-8 scorers (and 11 of thier top-12 scorers) from both the 2025-26 regular season and playoffs will be back in New York next season.
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
With Jordan Clarkson officially re-signed, all 8 of the Knicks' top-8 scorers (and 11 of thier top-12 scorers) from both the 2025-26 regular season and playoffs will be back in New York next season.

Not easy to do that in today's NBA.

Almost like Leon had a plan.

#RunItBack

items.title: July 10, 1989: The Chicago Bulls name assistant coach Phil Jackson as head coach, replacing Doug Collins (who was fired five days earlier).
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
July 10, 1989: The Chicago Bulls name assistant coach Phil Jackson as head coach, replacing Doug Collins (who was fired five days earlier).

Jackson—once a head coach in the Continental Basketball Association—became the third head coach hired by owner Jerry Reinsdorf since 1985.

items.title: Hollander POTD Pat Cummings. CIN F was drafted 59th in 78 by MIL. Was bench guy before trade to DAL in 82. NY gave him big deal in 84, where he peaked at 16 ppg & was a Hubie fave. Played out string w/MIA & UTA til 91. Got a lot out of talent but not a dynamic player. RIP.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Pat Cummings. CIN F was drafted 59th in 78 by MIL. Was bench guy before trade to DAL in 82. NY gave him big deal in 84, where he peaked at 16 ppg & was a Hubie fave. Played out string w/MIA & UTA til 91. Got a lot out of talent but not a dynamic player. RIP.

Things were easier in the 4th quarter: 8/15 FGs, 7:2 AST-TO ratio

Asked Jay Larranaga about what broke through offensively

Cam Christie made all three of his field goals in the first quarter, scoring 9 of his team-high 15 points and grabbing 4 of his team-high 8 rebounds in the opening frame

"I thought overall I was aggressive, I tried to make the right play, I made the right play most of the time"
